form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 46 days. Fresh up after three months finished third of 9 starters at Newbury on February 28 over 5200m, 7 len behind Copperhead carrying 74kg at $12. Previously second-up finished fifth of 8 starters at Newcastle on November 29 over 4700m, 34 len behind Konfusion carrying 74kg at $19. Fitter and will be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last run finished third in a small field at Exeter on March 22 over 6100m, 4.5 len behind Rivers Corner carrying 76kg at $6. Run before finished second in a small field at this track on March 5 over 5700m, 6 len behind Ki Woo with 76kg at $7. Capable of better showing. Well placed and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up pulled up at Newcastle on February 21 over 4000m. Second-up pulled up at Cheltenham on March 11 over 5900m. Others rate better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12.5). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up pulled up at Newcastle on February 21 over 4000m. Second-up pulled up at Cheltenham on March 11 over 5900m. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 36 day letup. Last start pulled up at Cheltenham on March 10 over 6000m. The run before won by 1.75 len this track on February 14 over 5700m defeating Top Of The Bill carrying 69kg at $7.50 in a steeplechase. Capable enough and is worth including.

The run before won by 1.75 len this track on February 14 over 5700m defeating Top Of The Bill carrying 69kg at $7.50 in a steeplechase. Capable enough and is worth including.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Newbury November 29 over 4500m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Ascot November 1 over 4800m. Hard to see him in the placings.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Newbury November 29 over 4500m. First up last campaign didn't finish the race at Ascot November 1 over 4800m. Hard to see him in the placings.

form.formComment: Resuming today after six months. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len Galway October 26 over 4526m defeating Ballybawn Belter with 67kg at $13. When resuming last campaign 14 of 16 runners at Galway August 1 over 4526m, 25 len behind Intense Approach with 75.5kg at $34. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB

When resuming last campaign 14 of 16 runners at Galway August 1 over 4526m, 25 len behind Intense Approach with 75.5kg at $34. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Returned from a spell and failed to finish in a steeplechase at Exeter. At only start last preparation won by 0.8 len this track on December 30 over 5700m defeating Jupiter Des Bordes carrying 69.5kg at $6 in a steeplechase. No surprise to see him back in form today.

formComments.title: TAB

At only start last preparation won by 0.8 len this track on December 30 over 5700m defeating Jupiter Des Bordes carrying 69.5kg at $6 in a steeplechase. No surprise to see him back in form today.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming didn't finish the race at Taunton on March 9 over 4600m. Last start won by 5.5 len Ascot on March 29 over 4800m defeating Gabbys Cross carrying 67.5kg at $3.80 in a steeplechase. Sure to improve again. Significant progress last start over this trip at Ascot scoring by 5.5L.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slipped after the road crossing approaching the home bend on the final circuit.
